content.query:
--create master key--

CREATE MASTER KEY ENCRYPTION BY PASSWORD ='Saivamsireddymorthala@123' 

--create credentials

CREATE DATABASE SCOPED CREDENTIAL serverless_cred_name
WITH
IDENTITY='Managed Identity'

--create external data source

CREATE EXTERNAL DATA SOURCE serverless_ext_data_source_
WITH
(
    LOCATION='https://saselflearningadls.dfs.core.windows.net/serverlessextds',
    CREDENTIAL=serverless_cred_name
)

--create external file formats for csv and parquet

CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT serverless_ext_file_format_csv
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE=DELIMITEDTEXT,
    FORMAT_OPTIONS(
        FIELD_TERMINATOR=',',
        FIRST_ROW=2
                   )
)


CREATE EXTERNAL FILE FORMAT serverless_ext_file_format_parquet
WITH
(
    FORMAT_TYPE=PARQUET,
    DATA_COMPRESSION='org.apache.hadoop.io.compress.SnappyCodec'
)
